backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend for Kollect Lite, including data types and CRUD operations for cases, activities, documents, and user profiles, with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (LoginPrompt redesign, LandingPage creation, router update, visual theme) to their target files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a reference summary of the frontend codebase's components, pages, hooks, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, primary, accent, destructive, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Kollect Lite React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that shows a charcoal loading spinner during initialization, renders LandingPage for unauthenticated users, and provides TanStack Router with TaskQueue and CaseDetail routes for authenticated users.
Activity form component with Action and Outcome dropdowns, conditional PTP Amount and PTP Date fields, a Comments textarea, and a submit button that posts activities to the backend via a React Query mutation.
frontend/src/components/ActivityTimeline: Read-only timeline component that fetches and displays case activities from the backend in reverse chronological order, showing timestamps, action/outcome badges, payment details, PTP info, and comments.
frontend/src/components/CaseCard.tsx: Displays a summary card for a debt collection case, showing debtor name, customer ID, phone number, DPD badge (color-coded by severity), and contract ID, with navigation to the case detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/CommentHistorySe: Renders a scrollable timeline of comments for a given case, fetched via dummy data, with color-coded comment bubbles and formatted timestamps.
frontend/src/components/CopyButton.tsx: A small button that copies provided text to the clipboard and briefly shows a checkmark confirmation icon.
frontend/src/components/DocumentsSection: Displays a list of dummy documents for a case with file type icons and preview buttons, plus Upload and Scan action buttons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header showing the Kollect Lite logo and title, with a logout button that clears the Internet Identity session and React Query cache.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component wrapping pages with the Header, a main content outlet, and a footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Full-screen login page with a styled card that prompts the user to sign in via Internet Identity, showing a loading spinner during authentication.
frontend/src/components/PhoneMockup.tsx: Renders children inside a visual iPhone frame mockup with a notch, status bar, and scrollable screen area for UI previewing purposes.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Renders a colored badge for a case status, mapping backend enum values (escalated, active, ptp) to display labels like ACTIVE or Closed.
frontend/src/data/dummyComments.ts: Defines a Comment interface and exports an array of dummy comment records associated with various case IDs, simulating agent interaction history for development/testing.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient-based login, logout, and identity state across the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating cases, activities, and documents via the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports the Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark mode semantic color tokens and brand-specific teal/charcoal palettes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/CaseDetail.tsx: Case detail page component that displays debtor information, status, financial details, and sections for activities and documents, using a hardcoded dummy cases map as fallback data.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page for Kollect Lite featuring a hero section, feature highlights, and an Internet Identity sign-in button for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/TaskQueue.tsx: Displays a searchable list of debt collection cases using dummy data, rendering each case as a CaseCard alongside a PhoneMockup component. Supports filtering by debtor name and manages selected case state.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including teal/charcoal brand color palettes, border radii, box shadows, and typography using oklch CSS variables, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for Kollect Lite, recording implemented features such as the LoginPrompt redesign, new LandingPage, router updates, and cohesive teal/charcoal visual theme, along with image requirements and architectural notes.
